selection_without_outcomes.economic_reason: negative recent SPY-TLT return correlation represents a disinflation or growth-risk regime with duration support for QQQ; nonnegative correlation represents an inflation-shock regime and selects SPY
selection_without_outcomes.independent_mechanism_statement: the signal measures stock-duration correlation sign rather than TLT leadership, yield direction, liquidity, credit, ETF leadership or own-price momentum

signal.source: fixed same-route Yahoo public adjusted-history responses for SPY and TLT, used only as retrospective-secondary signal identities
signal.formula: ordinary sample Pearson correlation of exactly 63 paired daily log returns over the 64 latest common accepted XNYS sessions through M-1 month-end
signal.target_rule: strictly negative SPY-TLT correlation means QQQ weight 1.0; zero or positive correlation means SPY weight 1.0
signal.availability_rule: the final window adjusted closes are conservatively available at 20:00 America/New_York after the accepted M-1 month-end close and before the frozen 20:05 decision
signal.missing_rule: fail closed; no alternate window, threshold, Fisher transform, interpolation, source blend, second signal, volatility scaling, persistence or smoothing
signal.ancestry_limitation: Yahoo current adjusted history is retrospective-secondary rather than historical-vintage primary evidence; its role is fixed before outcomes and it does not replace execution or corporate-action identities

timing_and_account.signal_freeze: 20:05 America/New_York after the last accepted XNYS close of the prior calendar month
timing_and_account.target_submission: 09:00 America/New_York on the next accepted XNYS session
timing_and_account.holding: until the following monthly accepted execution open
timing_and_account.decision_price: raw preceding-session close for each asset, available before target submission
timing_and_account.comparator: 50/50 SPY/QQQ rebalanced at identical monthly opens under identical whole-share, cost, calendar, lifecycle and corporate-action accounting

splits.cross_boundary_rule: no signal or portfolio state carries across splits

state_support_before_outcomes.minimums: 20 intervals, four of each state, and two transitions in each direction per split

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
arithmetic mean paired monthly active return strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
validation.failure_rule: holdout remains unopened and the lineage closes permanently

gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
uncentered type-7 0.05 lower bound strictly positive

bootstrap.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over monthly active returns
bootstrap.p_value: (1 + centered-null means at least observed mean)/(100000 + 1)
bootstrap.limitation: the three-month block is an outcome-blind dependence assumption, not proof of complete serial-dependence coverage

source_identities.runner_role: branch-only removable one-use research adapter; not shared infrastructure
